name: Hikaru Matsuyama
description: Hikaru Matsuyama (松山 光) is a main defender for Japan in Captain Tsubasa. He has taken the role of captain for Japan on several occasions, even replacing Kojiro Hyuga or Taro Misaki as the role of main leader. Though Matsuyama isn't a genius or naturally gifted, he is persistent and hard-working. Thanks to his hard work, he has many good skills.
creator: tsubasa5430
